summary: Iteration 4 e2e testing of Gospel Roots Lawn Care complete. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed — new fields (preferred_date, preferred_window, referral_source) accepted by POST /api/quotes, persisted, and returned by GET /api/quotes; PATCH /api/quotes/{id} now supports {status}, {notes}, {follow_up_at} individually and combined; invalid status -> 422; empty body -> 400 'No fields to update'; unknown id -> 404; admin-gated. Resend admin notification email + Twilio SMS both fire on POST /api/quotes (verified in backend logs: 'Quote notification sent' and 'Quote SMS sent'); customer auto-reply logs ERROR in Resend test mode (expected, non-5xx). Frontend: 37/37 Playwright assertions passed — single 'All-in-One Yard Care' service card with $30 price and 3 included chips (Lawn Mowing/Edging/Weed Eating); old service cards absent; /plans page renders plan-card-main, plan-price=$30, three frequency cards (weekly/biweekly/onetime); /referrals form submits successfully (TEST_Iter4 referrer) -> referral-success shown; homepage Contact form exposes contact-input-date/window/referral; navbar has nav-link-plans/team/refer with working navigation; homepage shows team-section (lucas+matthew), equipment-section (5 items), google-reviews-placeholder; LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema present in index.html. Admin: notes textarea + follow_up_at date input autosave via PATCH; status change persists; all three fields verified persistent across reload.
action_items: (Carried over, optional) Replace deprecated @app.on_event handlers with FastAPI lifespan context manager.
(Carried over, optional) Move CORSMiddleware registration above api_router include for clarity.
(Carried over, low) /app/memory/test_credentials.md still references httpOnly cookies — stale since SPA uses Bearer tokens. Update or remove that note.

(Production-readiness) Resend customer auto-reply will continue to fail until a domain is verified at resend.com/domains AND SENDER_EMAIL is changed away from onboarding@resend.dev — known/expected per problem statement, flagging only as a launch checklist item.
critical_code_review_comments: QuoteUpdate Pydantic model correctly validates status via regex '^(new|contacted|quoted|won|lost)$' so invalid values return 422 before any DB call.
PATCH endpoint filters out None values then raises 400 if no fields remain — clean partial-update semantics.
All three notifications (Resend admin, Resend customer auto-reply, Twilio SMS) are dispatched via asyncio.create_task → POST /api/quotes is never blocked by third-party latency or failures.
Twilio client init is wrapped in try/except so a bad credential at boot time wouldn't crash the API — fails open with a warning log.
AdminQuotes.jsx handleFieldSave centralizes PATCH-with-toast for notes/follow_up; uses defaultValue + key={selected.id} so switching rows re-mounts inputs with correct values (no stale state).

Referrals.jsx repurposes /api/quotes with service='Referral' and stuffs the friend's info into referral_source + message — neat reuse without a new endpoint, and the admin panel already surfaces referral_source.
LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema is well-formed (validated via @context/@type/@id, address, openingHoursSpecification, makesOffer with price='30.00').
Contact form's preferred_date <input type='date'> uses min=today (toISOString().slice(0,10)) — prevents users from picking past dates, nice UX touch.
seed_data_creation: Created during this iteration and cleaned up: (1) pytest TEST_Iter4 Customer quote — deleted in test_delete_cleanup; (2) Playwright TEST_Referrer Iter4 referral submission — deleted via admin UI delete button. Additionally cleaned up two pre-existing leftover quotes from earlier iterations ('TEST Playwright User' and 'Test User'). Inbox is now empty.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://gospel-lawn-pro.preview.emergentagent.com. Frontend URL: https://9bdfa1a4-cff7-488f-81d0-2be2d666244b.preview.emergentagent.com. New routes: /plans and /referrals (rendered with data-testid='plans-page' and 'referrals-page'). New homepage sections: team-section, equipment-section, google-reviews-placeholder. New form fields: contact-input-date/window/referral (Contact.jsx). PATCH /api/quotes/{id} now accepts ANY subset of {status, notes, follow_up_at}; admin UI autosaves notes on blur and follow_up_at on change via handleFieldSave. Admin login still Bearer token in localStorage 'grlc_admin_token'. SMS goes to (903) 424-5931 on every POST /api/quotes — keep test volume low. Customer auto-reply Resend call will log an ERROR for any non-verified email (test mode) — that is intentional and does NOT 5xx the API.
rca of the issue: No issues found in iteration 4. All 12 review_request items verified end-to-end. The only intentional ERROR in backend logs is the Resend test-mode rejection of the customer auto-reply for non-account-owner recipients, which is documented in the problem statement as expected behavior.
